# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cicd security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      environment:
        description: 'Deployment environment'
        required: true
        default: 'staging'
        type: choice
        options:
          - staging
          - production

permissions: {}

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      build_version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build_sha: ${{ steps.version.outputs.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Run linting
        run: npm run lint

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Generate build version
        id: version
        run: |
          VERSION="$(date +'%Y%m%d')-${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}-$(echo "${GITHUB_SHA}" | cut -c1-7)"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "sha=${GITHUB_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > dist/build-manifest.json <<EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit": "${{ steps.version.outputs.sha }}",
            "branch": "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}",
            "build_number": "${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}",
            "timestamp": "$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          }
          EOF

      - name: Compute artifact checksum
        id: checksum
        run: |
          cd dist
          find . -type f -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 sha256sum > ../artifact-checksums.txt
          cd ..
          sha256sum artifact-checksums.txt
          cp artifact-checksums.txt dist/

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          path: scripts/deploy/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  security-scan:
    name: Security Scan
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Verify artifact checksums
        run: |
          cd dist
          sha256sum -c artifact-checksums.txt
          echo "Artifact integrity verified successfully."

      - name: Run security scan
        run: |
          npm audit --production --audit-level=high || true
          echo "Security scan completed for build ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"

  deploy-staging:
    name: Deploy to Staging
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-staging
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Download deployment scripts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: scripts/deploy/

      - name: Verify artifact checksums
        run: |
          cd dist
          sha256sum -c artifact-checksums.txt
          echo "Artifact integrity verified successfully."

      - name: Verify build commit matches
        run: |
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' dist/build-manifest.json)
          if [ "${EXPECTED_SHA}" != "${MANIFEST_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest commit SHA does not match expected SHA"
            echo "Expected: ${EXPECTED_SHA}"
            echo "Got: ${MANIFEST_SHA}"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build commit verification passed."

      - name: Make deployment scripts executable
        run: chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh

      - name: Validate deployment scripts
        run: |
          for script in scripts/deploy/*.sh; do
            if ! bash -n "$script"; then
              echo "::error::Syntax error in ${script}"
              exit 1
            fi
          done
          echo "All deployment scripts passed syntax validation."

      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }} to staging..."
          bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.STAGING_DEPLOY_HOST }}
          ARTIFACT_PATH: dist/

      - name: Run smoke tests
        run: |
          echo "Running smoke tests against staging..."
          bash scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: staging
          TARGET_URL: https://staging.example.com
          SMOKE_TEST_TIMEOUT: "60"

      - name: Notify staging deployment
        if: always()
        run: |
          STATUS="${{ job.status }}"
          echo "Staging deployment status: ${STATUS}"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"

  deploy-production:
    name: Deploy to Production
    needs:
      - build
      - security-scan
      - deploy-staging
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' || startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/heads/release/')
    permissions:
      contents: read
      deployments: write
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://www.example.com
    concurrency:
      group: deploy-production
      cancel-in-progress: false
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: dist/

      - name: Download deployment scripts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          path: scripts/deploy/

      - name: Verify artifact checksums
        run: |
          cd dist
          sha256sum -c artifact-checksums.txt
          echo "Artifact integrity verified successfully."

      - name: Verify build commit matches
        run: |
          EXPECTED_SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          MANIFEST_SHA=$(jq -r '.commit' dist/build-manifest.json)
          if [ "${EXPECTED_SHA}" != "${MANIFEST_SHA}" ]; then
            echo "::error::Build manifest commit SHA does not match expected SHA"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "Build commit verification passed."

      - name: Make deployment scripts executable
        run: chmod +x scripts/deploy/*.sh

      - name: Validate deployment scripts
        run: |
          for script in scripts/deploy/*.sh; do
            if ! bash -n "$script"; then
              echo "::error::Syntax error in ${script}"
              exit 1
            fi
          done

      - name: Create pre-deployment backup
        run: |
          echo "Creating pre-deployment backup..."
          bash scripts/deploy/backup.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          BACKUP_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_BACKUP_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}

      - name: Deploy to production
        id: deploy
        run: |
          echo "Deploying version ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }} to production..."
          bash scripts/deploy/deploy.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}
          ARTIFACT_PATH: dist/

      - name: Run production smoke tests
        id: smoke_tests
        run: |
          echo "Running production smoke tests..."
          bash scripts/deploy/smoke-test.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          TARGET_URL: https://www.example.com
          SMOKE_TEST_TIMEOUT: "120"

      - name: Rollback on failure
        if: failure() && steps.deploy.outcome == 'success'
        run: |
          echo "::warning::Production deployment failed post-deploy checks. Initiating rollback..."
          bash scripts/deploy/rollback.sh
        env:
          DEPLOY_ENV: production
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_HOST }}

      - name: Notify production deployment
        if: always()
        run: |
          STATUS="${{ job.status }}"
          echo "Production deployment status: ${STATUS}"
          echo "Version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"

  cleanup:
    name: Cleanup Artifacts
    needs:
      - build
      - deploy-production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    permissions: {}
    steps:
      - name: Report final status
        run: |
          echo "Pipeline completed."
          echo "Build version: ${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          echo "Build job: ${{ needs.build.result }}"
          echo "Production deploy: ${{ needs.deploy-production.result }}"
